project.name: Example Product Line Roadmap
project.snapshotNotes: Sample snapshot for the Product-Line Roadmap Decision Tool.

products.name: Product 1.0
products.description: Retired production product retained for lineage and reference.

products.name: Product 2.0
products.description: Active production product for current roadmap decisions.

products.name: Product 2.5
products.description: Active intermediate product with selected capability upgrades.

capabilities.name: Enterprise Bulk Export Readiness
capabilities.description: Support customer segments that require scheduled export of large operational datasets.

capabilities.name: Secure Remote Update
capabilities.description: Support secure remote software update workflow.

capabilities.name: Input Power Envelope
capabilities.description: Supported platform input power constraint, such as 28VDC or 40VDC operation.

capabilities.name: Bulk Data Export
capabilities.description: Export large operational datasets on a scheduled or on-demand basis without interrupting normal use.

capabilities.name: Performance Envelope
capabilities.description: Meet the target performance envelope for a future product.

capabilityClaims.notes: Verified in lab with configuration caveats.

capabilityClaims.bdCaveat: Requires export service and storage impact review.

capabilityClaims.notes: Planned architecture not assessed for high-volume export workloads.

evidence.title: Secure Remote Update Lab Demo
evidence.summary: Lab demonstration of baseline remote update workflow.

gaps.title: Remote Update Verification Gap
gaps.description: Current baseline has only limited verification for a manual update workflow; target requires verified remote update support.

gaps.title: Bulk Export Design Gap
gaps.description: Target product needs high-volume export support; current export workflow is not assessed for large operational datasets.
gaps.technicalImpact: export service, storage layer, queue handling, verification dataset.

roadmapCandidates.name: Secure Update Enablement
roadmapCandidates.description: Enable secure remote update workflow for planned products.
roadmapCandidates.assumptions: Assumes existing controller has sufficient memory and security hooks.

roadmapCandidates.name: Bulk Export Enablement
roadmapCandidates.description: Enable high-volume operational data export for planned products.
roadmapCandidates.scheduleDrivers: Representative dataset availability and storage migration window
roadmapCandidates.assumptions: Assumes export workloads can be queued without degrading interactive workflows.

blockUpgrades.name: Product 3.0 Block Upgrade
blockUpgrades.objective: Close priority target needs for expanded segment support while capturing design and verification impacts.
blockUpgrades.notes: Initial upgrade package built from unmet needs and high-value candidates.

designElements.name: Export Service
designElements.description: Background export orchestration, file generation, retry handling, and delivery workflow.

designElements.name: Storage Layer
designElements.description: Operational data model, query paths, retention strategy, and bulk read performance.

capabilityDesignLinks.rationale: Bulk export changes require background job orchestration, retry handling, and delivery behavior.
Bulk export changes can affect query performance, retention, and storage throughput.
Secure update workflows depend on controller memory, boot flow, and security hooks.
High-volume export readiness depends on validated storage and query performance.

constraints.name: Dataset Size Operating Limit
constraints.description: Current active baseline is not assessed for export jobs above the validated dataset size.
constraints.limitValue: Exports limited to validated dataset size
constraints.workaround: Route large-export opportunities to planned product assessment.

impactAssessments.scheduleDriver: Representative dataset and load-test environment availability
impactAssessments.verificationConsequence: Large dataset export and retry verification required.
impactAssessments.riskConsequence: May require queueing or storage architecture changes.
impactAssessments.basis: Suggested by bulk export to export service link.
